SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-03-2025 Reset From Apr-28-25 To May-19-25 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zachary Spiegel, appellant
Brenda Herrera, respondent

The matter is on calendar for hearing on Appellant Zachary Spiegel's small claims appeal. The parties are affirmed and present their arguments.

Arguments having concluded, the court takes the matter under submission. The parties agree to submit additional documents for review. Appellant submits a letter to the court, respondent submits various emails, texts and invoices. Documents are added to the exhibits that have been lodged. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
